Councilman Funk is occasionally amusing. sometimes
noisy enough to be even interesting His comic speciality
roaring resentment of newspaper remarks that tend
exposure according to the Funk fiat hurts the city, 1t
isn't the existence of civic faults that do the damage It
IS telling the general public what the faults The
comedy develops from Funks disposition to take himself
seriously in this


In the ecstacy of his belief the other evening Funk
assaled statements that people had actually suffered in
this city for drinking water If they suffer they ought
suffer in silence Newspapers have business to voice
their woes.


But Funk is his antdote. He capped his Grafton
with the rather cooling assertion that every person in the
city had IS barrels of water to drink daily from the total
being pumped. If they get thirsty why don't they
soak in a few of these barrels?


This is where councilmanc ignorance is even
than bliss 1t amounts to mathematical lunacy Yet
In his most dwelling hour Funk is merely horrible
ample of how little the council has actually known of the
most important public utility it is expected to maintain
No councilman throat parched The CALLED jade
however, has WINGED.
